description: Owned-target web security assessment MCP server for authenticated, high-friction apps.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.joepangallo/web-recon-agent

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated hostnames allowed for scanning. Required.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TARGET_ALLOWLIST

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated hostnames you explicitly own to unlock active and owned-aggressive scan modes.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_OWNED_TARGETS

environmentVariables.description: Optional path for persisted job metadata. Defaults to mcp-jobs.json in the current working directory.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_JOB_STORE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional maximum number of concurrent scan jobs. Defaults to 2.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_MAX_CONCURRENT

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a JSON config file that overrides allowlist and concurrency settings.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_CONFIG_PATH
